name: xterm.js

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of <pre>+span when you need correct ANSI/CSI cursor movement, 256 colors/truecolor, scrollback, and a copyable transcript, because native implementations fail on the VT state machine, cursor semantics, and virtual scrolling for long logs. It is not an executable shell, SSH client, or real PTY.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can at most map a few SGR colors; they cannot provide complete ANSI/VT parsing, cursor rewriting, screen clearing, wide characters, and reliable scrollback. xterm.js interprets the same text stream with a real terminal buffer.

data_in.note: text is passed exactly to terminal.write, preserving ESC, \r, \n, and CSI sequences; do not convert it to HTML first. This only replays a transcript already held by AI and does not bind a backend PTY.

schema.convertEol?: boolean -- convert \n to the start of the next line; default false
schema.disableStdin?: boolean -- this entry defaults to true (replay only; upstream default false)

spec.note: Before Terminal.open, the container must be visible and have explicit dimensions; default height is 400px, which AI may override. Iron rule 3 forbids vh and percentage heights. cols/rows controls the character grid, not CSS pixels.

when_to_use: 需要正确呈现 ANSI/CSI 光标移动、256 色/truecolor、scrollback 与可复制 transcript 时用它而非 <pre>+span,因为原生手写在 VT 状态机、光标语义和长日志虚拟滚动上失败;非做可执行 shell、SSH 或真实 PTY。
why_valuable: AI 默认最多映射少量 SGR 颜色,做不到完整 ANSI/VT 解析、光标重写、清屏、宽字符和稳定 scrollback;xterm.js 用真实终端缓冲区解释同一文本流。

data_in.note: text 精确传给 terminal.write,保留 ESC、\r、\n 与 CSI 序列;不要预先转 HTML。这里只回放 AI 已持有的 transcript,不绑定后端 PTY。
data_in._why_no_example: ANSI/VT 文本是 AI 可直接生成的原生字符串且上游入口只有 write(text);裁剪 schema 足够,不附 minimal example。

schema.text: string —— 原始 ANSI/VT 文本流
schema.convertEol?: boolean —— 将 \n 转为下一行行首,默认 false
schema.disableStdin?: boolean —— 本条默认 true(纯回放;上游默认 false)

spec.note: Terminal.open 前容器必须可见且有显式尺寸;默认 height 400px,AI 可覆盖,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。cols/rows 控制字符网格,不是 CSS 像素。

carriers.widget: supported:ESM + CSS link 均可落 shadowRoot;默认 DOM renderer,无 worker/wasm/外部图片或 uplink 需求
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + DOM/CSS;仅 transcript 回放,不需要 PTY 或网络连接

isolation.evidence: globalStyleInjection=no: xterm creates <style> elements but appends them to its OWN subtree (`t.appendChild(this._styleElement)` and `this._screenElement.appendChild(...)` for the dimensions/theme styles) — zero `document.head` references — so styles stay inside the terminal container (the shadowRoot for widgets); the external xterm.css is boot-placed. globalDomMutation=no: terminal DOM renders inside the element passed to open(). globalEvents=yes: registers document-level listeners via `this._document.addEventListener('mouseup', ...)` (text selection), where `_document` = container.ownerDocument (shadow-aware); these are removed on terminal.dispose(), and for the disableStdin:true transcript-replay usage they are minimal. shadowCompatible=yes: uses `ownerDocument` throughout (18 refs) instead of hard `document`, and is widely used inside shadow DOM.
